courseTitle: Game Systems, Loops, and Player Experience
title: Hidden Information Bluffing Game
genericDescription: Use uncertainty as a system; create readable tells and counterplay; design AI or local multiplayer decision moments.
specificDescription: Build a two-sided game against another player or a simple bot where private information changes the value of choices. Include at least five rounds per match and a match recap showing key reveals.
gradingRubric: 30 pts hidden-information design; 20 pts counterplay and strategic depth; 20 pts functional opponent or local multiplayer flow; 15 pts match recap clarity; 15 pts documentation.
